sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find all objects in the bottom area (rows 50+)
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("=== Objects in bottom area (rows 50+) ===")
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_row = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
    if min_row >= 50:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bounds=[{min_row},{max_row}]x[{min_col},{max_col}]")

# Also check for objects around rows 55-63
print("\n=== All objects with row >= 55 ===")
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
    if min_row >= 55:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
